title: Salty Light Egyptian Fish Stir-fry
description: A light and diabetic-friendly post-workout dish featuring a flavorful mix of fish, aromatic spices, and vegetables to complement the workout without overwhelming your system.
instructions: Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic, sautéing until translucent. Add cumin, coriander, and fennel seeds, cook for another minute.
Throw in the red bell pepper and green beans, stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until slightly tender.
Fold in fish fillets, season with turmeric powder and salt (adjust according to taste). Stir well ensuring all pieces of fish are evenly coated.
Continue stirring and cooking until the fish is cooked through. Fish should be opaque and have no raw texture left.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
